# System Fault

## Filter by fault severity

Supported values
- any (default)
- critical
- major
- minor
- warning

Example: severity critical with verbose view

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_system_fault.severity_critical:iserver.output.default
```

Example: severity major with summary view

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_system_fault.severity_critical:iserver.output.default
```

Developer

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_system_fault.severity_critical:devel.debug
```
